description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and tests that runs on push to master, on pull requests to master, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has five jobs: build-native, build-cross, fingerprints, other-tests, and more-tests, all running on ubuntu-latest. The build-native job builds the project in debug and release modes. The build-cross job builds the project for Windows and macOS in debug and release modes. The fingerprints job runs fingerprint tests in debug and release modes. The other-tests job runs tests in various test directories. The more-tests job runs additional tests specified by script names.
